scripts.build:loader: npx terser public/assets/loader.source.js -o public/assets/loader.min.js -c -m && npx javascript-obfuscator public/assets/loader.min.js --output public/assets/loader.js --compact true --identifier-names-generator hexadecimal --string-array true --string-array-threshold 0.5 --self-defending false --control-flow-flattening false && del public\assets\loader.min.js
